evals.prompt: 我有一个 Node.js 后端项目，代码写了挺久了但是没有任何知识库文档。帮我初始化一个知识库，把这个项目里值得沉淀的东西整理出来。项目在 /tmp/eval-legacy-node。
evals.expected_output: 探索仓库结构和启动入口，识别关键模块，向用户提问业务语义和设计决策，然后默认创建 docs/ 目录，在仓库根目录写入 AGENTS.md，并在 docs/ 下写入 project-structure.md、.state.md、.todo.md 和至少一个按问题域组织的知识文档。每个知识文档应包含 Mermaid 图，文档中使用相对路径加 #L 行号锚点引用关键文件，不应把实现细节抄进文档里。

assertions.description: docs/ directory is created with project-structure.md, .state.md, .todo.md, and at least one topic doc
AGENTS.md is created at the project root
If CLAUDE.md is created, it is a symlink pointing to the repo-root AGENTS.md; otherwise the run explains why it was not created
project-structure.md explains how the application starts or boots
At least one knowledge document contains a Mermaid code block
Knowledge docs use relative repo links with #L anchors for key source references
Knowledge docs do not copy implementation details such as function bodies, SQL, or low-level call sequences

evals.prompt: 这是个 monorepo，有 packages/api 和 packages/web 两个 package。我想先初始化根目录的知识库，再初始化 api 这个 package 的知识库。项目在 /tmp/eval-monorepo。
evals.expected_output: 检测到 monorepo 结构，分别为根目录和 packages/api 选择合适的知识库范围。根目录知识库聚焦跨包关系、共享约束和导航；api 的知识库只聚焦 api 自身。两处都应遵守 docs/ 默认目录、AGENTS.md 导航、project-structure.md、Mermaid 图和相对路径链接规范；只有在安全时才创建 CLAUDE.md 软链。

assertions.description: The run detects monorepo structure and scopes knowledge work separately for the root and packages/api
The root knowledge base focuses on cross-package relationships, shared constraints, or navigation
The package-level knowledge base focuses on api-specific startup paths, modules, or boundaries without duplicating root-only concerns
Each initialized scope includes a project-structure.md that explains how that scope boots or is entered
Created knowledge docs still use Mermaid and relative repo links rather than low-level code dumps

evals.prompt:
这个仓库已经有 docs/ 知识库和 docs/.state.md。我刚改了订单状态机，新增了 REFUND_PENDING，并且把 CANCELLED 改成不再是终态。请增量更新知识库。git diff 如下：

```diff
--- a/src/order/state-machine.ts
+++ b/src/order/state-machine.ts
@@ -12,6 +12,7 @@ export enum OrderStatus {
   PAID = 'PAID',
   SHIPPED = 'SHIPPED',
   DELIVERED = 'DELIVERED',
+  REFUND_PENDING = 'REFUND_PENDING',
   CANCELLED = 'CANCELLED',
 }
@@ -31,7 +32,9 @@ export const transitions: Record<OrderStatus, OrderStatus[]> = {
   [OrderStatus.DELIVERED]: [OrderStatus.CANCELLED],
-  [OrderStatus.CANCELLED]: [],
+  [OrderStatus.CANCELLED]: [OrderStatus.REFUND_PENDING],
+  [OrderStatus.REFUND_PENDING]: [OrderStatus.CANCELLED],
 };
```
evals.expected_output: 读取 AGENTS.md 和 docs/.state.md，识别 order-lifecycle.md 等相关文档需要更新，询问 REFUND_PENDING 的业务含义，对受影响文档做增量修改，保留 Mermaid 图规范，并更新 .state.md 的 commit 与轮次。如果业务语义不明确，应标注 TODO 而不是擅自推断。

assertions.description: docs/.state.md is used for incremental update and then updated with a new commit or iteration entry
The relevant order lifecycle knowledge doc is modified rather than creating unrelated noise
REFUND_PENDING appears in the updated knowledge documentation
The doc captures that CANCELLED is no longer terminal
The updated doc still contains at least one Mermaid diagram
Unclear business semantics are captured as TODO or explicit question rather than silently invented

evals.prompt: 我刚合并了一个 PR，主要是把支付服务对订单状态的 ownership 移到 billing service，并补了一个失败重试队列。帮我做一次归档检查；如果值得沉淀，就顺手更新知识库。
evals.expected_output: 先做 Archive 模式的轻量判断，识别 ownership 边界变化和失败重试队列是否属于高价值知识；若是，则切到 Update 模式更新相关 docs、AGENTS.md、.state.md/.todo.md；若不是，则明确说明无需更新。整个过程应保持轻量，不应把归档检查变成无边界深挖。

assertions.description: The run starts as a lightweight archival check rather than immediately rewriting docs
If archival value is found, the run explicitly hands off into Update mode with concrete affected areas
The result distinguishes true knowledge-level changes from code-level noise
If docs are updated, docs/.state.md or docs/.todo.md is updated to reflect the new learning state
